item.title: Deviousness Day 137
item.description:
Triple posting today to make 69 posts dis year before my cake day sunday. enjoy! no ping list! cause that would be a lot. will be in deviousness discord shortly here for gaming. Linkies to the discord and the steam group and bigger spiel with more info about it at the bottom of the post! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share artwork and on fridays do drawings based on word prompts given by members. I has a Deviousness discord server! We have a general area for memes and discussions of all different SFWish topics! We have gaming fun! I am really bad about running events and being consistent. I do randomly show up in vc and game. All are welcome who want to game or watch us game or just hang out feel free to hop into the vc. please do be respectful if we are in game let us chat for the game. We have an opt in kink area for dirtier conversations and then a role locked area for deeper kink discussions! (It is role locked because we take privacy and security very seriously and the discord is a place with real people sharing and things being shared is a privilege) Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
I love you *my* Daddy. Friendly reminder I am claimed so I would appreciate keeping that in mind when making comments towards me see dis: https://imgur.com/JipV5UR I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe I am changing how I add people to my ping list so please see here to get added or removed: https://imgur.com/a/fFYOR2B there is now the option on desktop to follow when someone posts so feel free to do that and lemme know and I can remove you from the ping list. I dont think I will get rid of it entirely so if you prefer the special feeling of getting a ping it will also continue to be an option.
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Deviousness Day 138
item.description:
Triple posting today to make 69 posts dis year before my cake day sunday. enjoy! no ping list! cause that would be a lot. will be in deviousness discord shortly here for gaming. Linkies to the discord and the steam group and bigger spiel with more info about it at the bottom of the post! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share artwork and on fridays do drawings based on word prompts given by members. I has a Deviousness discord server! We have a general area for memes and discussions of all different SFWish topics! We have gaming fun! I am really bad about running events and being consistent. I do randomly show up in vc and game. All are welcome who want to game or watch us game or just hang out feel free to hop into the vc. please do be respectful if we are in game let us chat for the game. We have an opt in kink area for dirtier conversations and then a role locked area for deeper kink discussions! (It is role locked because we take privacy and security very seriously and the discord is a place with real people sharing and things being shared is a privilege) Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
I love you *my* Daddy. Friendly reminder I am claimed so I would appreciate keeping that in mind when making comments towards me see dis: https://imgur.com/JipV5UR I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe I am changing how I add people to my ping list so please see here to get added or removed: https://imgur.com/a/fFYOR2B there is now the option on desktop to follow when someone posts so feel free to do that and lemme know and I can remove you from the ping list. I dont think I will get rid of it entirely so if you prefer the special feeling of getting a ping it will also continue to be an option.

item.title: The 80s were special, music picture edition
item.description:
Toyah Wilcox
Beastie Boys
Pat Benatar
Iron Maiden
Altered Images
Clare Grogan from Altered Images. Some may recognise her from Gregory's Girl and as Kochanski in Red Dwarf
Motley Crue
Girlschool
Prince and the Revolution
Sabrina
David Bowie
Janet Jackson
Michael Jackson
Adam and the Ants
Warlock
Lita Ford and Doro Pesch (Warlock)
Bonnie Tyler
Pantera!
Sheena Easton
Twisted Sister
Lee Aaron
The Bangles
Run DMC
Samantha Fox
Spandau Ballet
David Lee Roth
Heart
Manowar
Tina Turner
Flock of Seagulls
Tracey Ullman
W.A.S.P.
The Human League
Vixen
Poison
Wendy James of Transvision Vamp
Guns n Roses
Carol Decker of T`Pau

item.title: Deviousness Day 136
item.description:
Triple posting today to make 69 posts dis year before my cake day sunday. enjoy! no ping list! cause that would be a lot. will be in deviousness discord shortly here for gaming. Linkies to the discord and the steam group and bigger spiel with more info about it at the bottom of the post! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share artwork and on fridays do drawings based on word prompts given by members. I has a Deviousness discord server! We have a general area for memes and discussions of all different SFWish topics! We have gaming fun! I am really bad about running events and being consistent. I do randomly show up in vc and game. All are welcome who want to game or watch us game or just hang out feel free to hop into the vc. please do be respectful if we are in game let us chat for the game. We have an opt in kink area for dirtier conversations and then a role locked area for deeper kink discussions! (It is role locked because we take privacy and security very seriously and the discord is a place with real people sharing and things being shared is a privilege) Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
I love you *my* Daddy. Friendly reminder I am claimed so I would appreciate keeping that in mind when making comments towards me see dis: https://imgur.com/JipV5UR I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe I am changing how I add people to my ping list so please see here to get added or removed: https://imgur.com/a/fFYOR2B there is now the option on desktop to follow when someone posts so feel free to do that and lemme know and I can remove you from the ping list. I dont think I will get rid of it entirely so if you prefer the special feeling of getting a ping it will also continue to be an option.

item.title: Warhammer Meme for my Hubby, Day 2!
item.description:
You can never trust those Blood Ravens...
True story, this has been one of our conversations on the phone.
I have learned that I'm just a Tech Priest...
No titans were injured in the making of this meme.
item.dc:creator: QuackMagicAndHerMagicalBeer

item.title: It's a wrap
item.dc:creator: DOcelot

item.title: Fell back, but got up
item.description: 3 months ago I fell off the wagon, almost had a heartattack. But for the past 3 months, I have walked and trained, eat healthier and not a single drop of the bad juice. I feel the urge sometimes but I am happier
item.dc:creator: Upvotekittenz

item.description: This shit is ridiculous.

item.title: I just turned 30! And no one else is awake lol but I found my wedding dress last week and wanted to share.
item.dc:creator: hadtochangebecauseevery1assumediwasaguy

item.title: Bunch of D*cks
item.description: Real Talk: Ever fall in love with a show or a comic, only to find out it got canceled because not enough people supported it? We don’t want that to happen here. The truth is, creating these comics is a labor of love, but love alone doesn’t pay the bills. Without financial support, even the things you cherish can fade away. By joining our Patreon, you’re not just getting awesome perks—you’re keeping this comic alive. If you love what we do, help us make sure it doesn’t disappear. Your support means everything. PS: https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: Grandson Surprises Former Model Grandma With Makeover & Photoshoot ... Grandpa's Gonna Need To Step Up His Game ..
item.description:
Oliver Muhl, 20, surprises his grandmother, 77, who was once a prominent model gracing the pages of renowned fashion magazines such as Vogue, Marie Claire, Jour de France, and Elle. In an effort to recreate the glamour of her past, Oliver organized a full glam squad—including makeup artists, hairstylists, and a wardrobe team—before taking her on a photoshoot in Paris, France.
https://www.newsweek.com/man-surprises-former-model-grandma-photoshoot-grandpa-awe-1946570 https://www.tiktok.com/@olliemuhl/video/7405715080257621290
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: FRIDAY'S FUNNIES. YOU DECIDE.
item.description:
Ut's trash day somewhere, Imgur...have a good one! #Funnies
FAMILY FLICKS ...FLICKS
item.dc:creator: doxydad1

item.title: It's true. And it's glorious. And it's free. You just login to your baking site, type in a person's email address, the amount, and send.
item.description: You can even setup automatic deposit, so someone can send you money, and 30 minutes later it'll be in your account without having to do anything.
item.dc:creator: majortool

item.title: You already know what’s gonna happen before you even watched the video
item.dc:creator: Nousentre

item.title: Working hard and getting stronger
item.description: I really enjoy going to therapy each week. I have gotten so much stronger. I enjoy working towards my goals. Some days are frustrating. But I just keep working hard. I hope everyone is having a wonderful day.
item.dc:creator: kaosnole95
